body.title: Rename all audit skills to audit-<scope> shape
body.description:
Rename existing audit-shaped skills to a unified audit-<scope> family. /day-close-audit → audit-day. /deep-audit → audit-expert. /validate-files folds into audit-debris (created in companion ticket). /review splits into audit-ticket (filing-time mode) and audit-precode (sprint plan-time mode); /review retires.

This ticket only does the rename + redirect skeletons (skill files + skill index entries). Each renamed skill keeps current behavior; new layers/checks land in their own tickets.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/ → audit-day/, ~/.claude/skills/deep-audit/ → audit-expert/, ~/.claude/skills/review/ → audit-ticket/ + new audit-precode/, ~/.claude/skills/validate-files/ → folded ticket.
**Design rules:** no persistence (skill files only). docs-in-code: N/A (markdown skill files). no-new-memory-schemas: N/A.
**Test plan:** invoke each renamed skill via Skill tool; confirm same behavior as before. Old skill names redirect or 404 cleanly.
